name: Joker - Extinguished Sun
description:
The sad jester that knows a little too much finds you by the palace.

· · ─ ·✶· ─ · ·

This joker is based on his own skin, "Extinguished Sun". I wanted to make something different but I actually don't know if It's good enough. I can actually make a series, but my brain is already melting with the possibilities!
TBH all "secrets" about the kingdom are going to be part of your story! There's nothing set about it until know.
ALSO! Mike and Margo are in the character's scrip, so he might know or talk about them if you ask to.


✦ . + . ✦ . + . ✦ Hope you enjoy it! ✦ . + . ✦ . + . ✦
